title: Vitest configuration file for test runner setup
purpose: Configures the Vitest test runner with global settings, environment, test inclusion/exclusion patterns, and coverage reporting.
module_context: Exports a default configuration object for Vitest that defines test behavior including globals, environment, file inclusion/exclusion, setup files, and coverage settings.

steps.content: Configure Vitest to use global variables in test environment.
Include all test files matching the pattern src/**/*.test.ts.
Exclude specified test files from running in Vitest.
Specify setup file to run before tests.
Configure code coverage reporting with v8 provider.
Set coverage reporters to text, json, and html formats.
Include all source files in coverage calculation.
